description_long: This is a sleek, matte-black coupe car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a pronounced rear spoiler, suggesting a sporty design. The car features gold alloy wheels that stand out against the dark body, and the side exhaust pipes hint at high performance. The windows are tinted and the roofline flows smoothly into the rear, giving it a fastback appearance. The front end is aggressive, with sculpted fenders and a low-set grille, while the rear is compact with a visible bumper and taillights. The doors are flush with the body, and the overall build is compact yet muscular, typical of high-end sports coupes. The interior, though not fully visible, likely includes standard automotive materials such as leather, plastic, and glass.
description: A matte-black, sporty coupe car with gold wheels, a fastback roofline, and a prominent rear spoiler, exuding a high-performance, aggressive look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the aggressive, low-slung nose, sculpted hood, and wide fenders.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the gold wheels, side exhaust pipes, and the smooth fastback roofline.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the compact back, rear spoiler, and visible bumper details.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with gold wheels and side exhaust, but less detail on the wheels.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
